expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: REPORT_STATE and resume semantics remain stable
expectations.evidence: Baseline output inventories fixture inputs only; it does not demonstrate stable REPORT_STATE/resume semantics.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase0
expectations.evidence: Baseline output is a static note and does not materialize phase-0 runtime setup artifacts or phase gating.

uncertainties: Baseline run is a prompt-only blind assessment because the repo does not provide a local one-click no-skill executor.
workarounds: Used frozen fixture review as the no-skill baseline.
